sections.paragraph:
and אַגְמֹן m.-

(1) a boiling caldron, Job 41:12 see אָגַם No. 1 .

(2) a rush, reed, such as grows in marshes, from אֲגַם a marsh, and the termination ֹון, Isa 58:5. As to Isa 9:13 19:15 , comp. כִּפָּה.

(3) a rope of rushes, a muzzle of reeds, like the Greek σχοῖνος, Job 40:26 , compare Plin.N.H.xix.2.
